product.title: Ultrablend 4 In 1 Foundation, 2025 New Upgrade Match Skin Color Changed Foundation Liquid With Spf 50,Glowing Hydrating, Waterproof for Makeup
featureBullets: Exquisite Coverage and Flawless Finish: Enjoy the benefits of a 4-in-1 color concealer that brightens, hydrates, and protects your skin with SPF, all while delivering a natural, beautiful bare look that’s perfect for any occasion.

Moisturizing and Lightweight: Infused with a unique moisturizing blend, this foundation not only offers outstanding coverage but also hydrates your skin, ensuring a smooth, radiant finish that feels as good as it looks.

Long-lasting and Waterproof Formula: Our long-lasting, waterproof formula ensures your makeup stays intact all day, providing excellent resistance against sweat and humidity, perfect for women on the go who desire a simple yet stunning look.

Broad Spectrum Protection: With SPF 50, this 4 in 1 foundation liquid not only enhances your complexion but also shields your skin from harmful, for all skin types, whether neutral, oily, dry, sensitive, making it a perfect choice for daily wear.
Easy Application: This women's foundation is easy to apply and blend seamlessly into your skin, with a satisfaction guarantee ensuring that you receive a product that meets your beauty needs.
product.description: This advanced foundation boasts a lightweight and hydrating composition that effortlessly glides onto the skin for a smooth, seamless finish. Experience exceptional coverage that brilliantly conceals imperfections, ensuring your beauty radiates with a natural glow. Designed to provide a true fit for all skin tones,Enhances your natural beauty while delivering SPF protection for added care.

specification.value: Exquisite Coverage, Hydrates, Long-lasting, Waterproof, SPF 50, Easy Application
#38,620 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #345 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers give positive feedback about the foundation's quality and natural look. The color match and coverage receive mixed reviews - while some say it blends well with their skin tone, others report it doesn't cover dark spots. The texture and blendability also get mixed reactions.

reviews.reviewTitle: Lovely product, gives natural look with great coverage.
reviews.reviewText: There are mixed reviews for this product but I’m glad I took a chance and ordered it. It’s not thick and heavy and actually works for me. I’m not sure exactly how it works but it does. It gives great coverage with a more natural look.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 13, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Did not give the same results as seen in advertisement for me
reviews.reviewText: I tried it using my fingers and it had this gritty texture to it, which turned me off right away. I tried to give it the benefit of the doubt and use a make up brush. I could not see any coverage and I even tried it on the back of my hand to see if I noticed it. It did not show coverage like the video and it did not cover any dark spots. Maybe it works for some, but it did not work for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 28, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Love the texture, but was too light for me
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It does change colors. Not a perfect match
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is the best foundation. I am 73 and love how it is so easy to spread. It goes on white but then turns to match your complexion and it is not heavy. I will keep using this!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 29, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Coverage is very soft and appears that you have no makeup just nice skin
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Doesn’t work for me didn’t cover my redness or dark spots and just feels like I have oily moisturizer on my face not happy. I wasted my money on another product that lied.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love this Rise Luxus makeup and also. Cos it has sunblock on it .is exelent.i recommended to everyone reading this .Im planing to buy more when runs out.😍😍😍
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 27, 2026
